lines.english: What happened to the boys in the night?
lines.chinese: 晚上男孩们发生了什么事？
lines.raw: What happened to the boys in the night? | 晚上男孩们发生了什么事？

lines.english: Late in the afternoon, the boys put up their tent in the middle of a field.
lines.chinese: 下午很晚的时候，男孩们把帐篷搭在了田野中央。
lines.raw: Late in the afternoon, the boys put up their tent in the middle of a field. | 下午很晚的时候，男孩们把帐篷搭在了田野中央。

lines.english: As soon as this was done, they cooked a meal over an open fire.
lines.chinese: 这一切刚弄好，他们就在篝火上做了一顿饭。
lines.raw: As soon as this was done, they cooked a meal over an open fire. | 这一切刚弄好，他们就在篝火上做了一顿饭。

lines.english: They were all hungry and the food smelled good.
lines.chinese: 他们都饿了，食物闻起来很香。
lines.raw: They were all hungry and the food smelled good. | 他们都饿了，食物闻起来很香。

lines.english: After a wonderful meal, they told stories and sang songs by the campfire.
lines.chinese: 美餐一顿之后，他们围着篝火讲故事，唱歌。
lines.raw: After a wonderful meal, they told stories and sang songs by the campfire. | 美餐一顿之后，他们围着篝火讲故事，唱歌。

lines.english: But some time later it began to rain.
lines.chinese: 但过了一会儿，天开始下雨了。
lines.raw: But some time later it began to rain. | 但过了一会儿，天开始下雨了。

lines.english: The boys felt tired so they put out the fire and crept into their tent.
lines.chinese: 男孩们感到疲倦了，于是他们熄灭了篝火，钻进了帐篷。
lines.raw: The boys felt tired so they put out the fire and crept into their tent. | 男孩们感到疲倦了，于是他们熄灭了篝火，钻进了帐篷。

lines.english: Their sleeping bags were warm and comfortable, so they all slept soundly.
lines.chinese: 他们的睡袋又暖和又舒服，所以他们都睡得很香。
lines.raw: Their sleeping bags were warm and comfortable, so they all slept soundly. | 他们的睡袋又暖和又舒服，所以他们都睡得很香。

lines.english: In the middle of the night, two boys woke up and began shouting.
lines.chinese: 半夜里，两个男孩醒了，开始大叫起来。
lines.raw: In the middle of the night, two boys woke up and began shouting. | 半夜里，两个男孩醒了，开始大叫起来。

lines.english: The tent was full of water!
lines.raw: The tent was full of water! | 帐篷里全是水！

lines.english: They all leapt out of their sleeping bags and hurried outside.
lines.chinese: 他们都跳出睡袋，匆匆忙忙跑到了外面。
lines.raw: They all leapt out of their sleeping bags and hurried outside. | 他们都跳出睡袋，匆匆忙忙跑到了外面。

lines.english: It was raining heavily and they found that a stream had formed in the field.
lines.chinese: 雨下得很大，他们发现田野里形成了一条小溪。
lines.raw: It was raining heavily and they found that a stream had formed in the field. | 雨下得很大，他们发现田野里形成了一条小溪。

lines.english: The stream wound its way across the field and then flowed right under their tent!
lines.chinese: 小溪蜿蜒穿过田野，然后正好从他们的帐篷下面流过！
lines.raw: The stream wound its way across the field and then flowed right under their tent! | 小溪蜿蜒穿过田野，然后正好从他们的帐篷下面流过！
